stated_pain_points.description: Counts rarely match the ERP, and there is no time to investigate why

process_claims.claim: Cycle counts are done weekly but only on a subset of aisles chosen informally
Received goods are sometimes put away before being booked into the ERP

system_claims.claim: The ERP does not flag negative on-hand balances, so they go unnoticed

quantified_impacts.description: Time spent reconciling counts each week

contradictions_or_followups.description: Operations manager stated counts are full-warehouse monthly; warehouse lead describes partial weekly. Reconcile the actual counting cadence.
Obtain the adjustment log to quantify unreviewed adjustments.

consultant_notes: Credible, hands-on account. Prioritize getting the adjustment log to corroborate.
